```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The cost to live in Oceanside and Vista are 142.5% of the national average.",
    "The San Diego Food Bank started the first state-funded Diaper Bank Program in 2017.",
    "Since its inception, the Diaper Bank Program has distributed over 34.5 million diapers.",
    "State funding of $1.2 million a year for the Diaper Bank Program has been cut.",
    "The San Diego Food Bank provides food and basic resources like diapers to 39,000 military families every month.",
    "A month’s supply of diapers for one child can cost between $70 and $80.",
    "Diapers cannot be purchased with CalFresh benefits or WIC.",
    "47% of households with children under age 4 are experiencing diaper need according to the National Diaper Bank Network’s 2023 report.",
    "Not having diapers can adversely affect a mother’s feeling of self-worth, negatively impacting the mother-child bond."
  ]
}
```
